scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.build:client: node scripts/check-client-env.mjs && npm run build:prod --prefix client
scripts.test:all: npm test --prefix server && npm run build:client
scripts.check:env: npm run check:env:client && npm run check:env:server
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:client && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:hosting:preview: npm run build:client && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview
